zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerard de Braybrooke於1307年10月7日出生在英國貝德福爾可爾沃斯時，他的父親Gerald Braybrooke Sr43歲，母親Lora Picott33歲。他於1337年與Isabella Dakeney在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年3月17日在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾霍爾森登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerard de Braybrooke于1307年10月7日出生在英国貝德福爾可爾沃斯时，他的父亲Gerald Braybrooke Sr43岁，母亲Lora Picott33岁。他于1337年与Isabella Dakeney在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1359年3月17日在英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾霍爾森登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braybrooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Gerard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerard de Braybrooke was born on 7 October 1307, in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Gerald Braybrooke Sr, was 43 and his mother, Lora Picott, was 33. He married Isabella Dakeney in 1337, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 March 1359, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Horsenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerard de Braybrooke est né le 7 octobre 1307, à Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Gerald Braybrooke Sr, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lora Picott, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Dakeney en 1337, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1359, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Horsenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerard de Braybrooke am 7. Oktober 1307 in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerald Braybrooke Sr 43 und seine Mutter Lora Picott 33. Er hat 1337 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Isabella Dakeney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. März 1359 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Horsenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Braybrooke è nato il il 7 ottobre 1307 nel Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Gerald Braybrooke Sr, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Lora Picott, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Dakeney nel 1337, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 marzo 1359, nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Horsenden, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerard de Braybrookeが1307年10月7日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコルムウオルスで生まれた時，父Gerald Braybrooke Srは43歳，母Lora Picottは33歳であった。1337年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでIsabella Dakeneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年3月17日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアホールセンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerard de Braybrooke(이)가 1307년 10월 7일 영국 베드퍼드실르 콜워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerald Braybrooke Sr(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Lora Picott(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 Isabella Dakeney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 3월 17일 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 호르센든에 묻혔다.

pt.7 October 1307–17 March 1359: 7 de outubro de 1307–17 de março de 1359
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerard de Braybrooke nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1307, em Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gerald Braybrooke Sr, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lora Picott, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Dakeney em 1337, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1359, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Horsenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerard de Braybrooke родился 7 октября 1307 г. в местности колмворт, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gerald Braybrooke Sr было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lora Picott, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Dakeney в 1337 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 марта 1359 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности хаурсенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.7 October 1307–17 March 1359: 7 de octubre de 1307–17 de marzo de 1359
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerard de Braybrooke nació el 7 de octubre de 1307, en Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gerald Braybrooke Sr, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lora Picott, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Isabella Dakeney en 1337, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1359, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Horsenden, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
